title: Makham Greek Borek
description: Sweet and chewy Greek borek filled with a tangy makham and tamarind paste.
instructions: Thaw the filo dough according to package instructions.
Cut the filo dough into 4 equal pieces.
In a bowl, mix together the makham, tamarind paste, honey, fermented yogurt, chewy sugar, and water.
Place a piece of filo dough on a flat surface and brush with vegetable oil.
Place 1/4 cup of the makham mixture in the center of the filo dough.
Fold the filo dough over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining filo dough and filling.
Place the borek on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Dust with powdered sugar (if using) and serve warm.
